mapper.sql: id, line_id, line_type, direction, job_name, start_time, end_time, `operator`, description, speed, test_section, test_date, test_type, sampling_frequency, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into jobs (line_id, line_type, direction, job_name, start_time, end_time, `operator`, description, speed, test_section, test_date, test_type, sampling_frequency, created_at) values (#{lineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{direction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{speed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{testType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{samplingFrequency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into jobs
line_id, line_type, direction, job_name, start_time, end_time, `operator`, description, speed, test_section, test_date, test_type, sampling_frequency, created_at,
#{lineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{direction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{speed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{testType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{samplingFrequency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update jobs set line_id = #{lineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, line_type = #{lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, direction = #{direction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `operator` = #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, speed = #{speed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, test_section = #{testSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, test_date = #{testDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, test_type = #{testType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sampling_frequency = #{samplingFrequency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
